data.body: Re-review (subagent, adversarial): VERDICT PASS. All 3 CRITICAL bugs verified genuinely fixed — reviewer reproduced the chain against real gitleaks 8.30.1: (1) tempfile-report + abstain-on-no-parseable-SARIF (no silent fail-OPEN; clean run → [] not abstain); (2) re-attribution to sentinel id (consumer prefix filter keeps records); (3) absolute→repo-relative URI relativization (diff-scope matches). Fail-OPEN oracle invariant preserved (evidence vocab has no 'block' outcome). Tests non-vacuous on the fixed paths. Advisory MINOR #1 (scanners are a runtime dependency of the enabled gate → fail-closed BLOCK if absent) remediated with an operator note in ADR 0012. MINOR #2 (multi-SARIF-detector attribution) + the pre-existing registry.py:252 precedence are forward-looking/out-of-scope, filed mentally as non-blocking. Proceeding to commit + close.
